title: senecio pseudaspericaulis
intro: Senecio pseudaspericaulis, also known as the Woolly Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio pseudaspericaulis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and provide relief from congestion. Herbal preparations of Senecio pseudaspericaulis often involve infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
